features: With this limited edition Glade Room Sprays you can imagine yourself on a journey to Lapland We have a full collection of wintery classics with a magical twist for you to discover
Glade Room Spray Arctic Apple Pie will fill the air with the festive fragrance of the holiday season
This air freshener spray is designed to fight tough odors; each burst instantly freshens; lasts up to 7 hours
Arctic Apple Pie fragrance with additional notes of vanilla and mixed berries provide a warm and welcoming aroma, Ideal for the holiday season
Use on a daily basis, or as the final touch after the cleaning routine
description: Product Description Take a break with Glade Relaxing Zen room freshener spray. The air is warm, the water is cool, the flowers are vibrant and the soul is serene, as notes of crisp apple meet dewy florals and tranquil sandalwood. Designed to fight tough odours and leave behind a fresh calming fragrance, Glade air fresheners can be used on a daily basis or as the final touch after your cleaning routine. This relaxing scent instantly infuses the air with passionately crafted fragrances. Ingredients Glade Air Freshener, Aerosol Room Spray, Relaxing Zen, 300ml Directions Shake can well. To freshen the air, point can towards the centre of the room and spray. This product is not recommended for use on fabrics. Manufacturer Contact Information SC Johnson Ltd., Camberley, GU16 7AJ.
